---
title: "Exercises"
---

Each exercise comes in **two formats**:

-   **View (HTML)** — a rendered page that shows every code chunk and the interleaved *Think about it* questions. Code is shown but **not executed** in the HTML, so the page is quick to load and safe to read without any data downloaded.
-   **Download (.qmd)** — the raw Quarto source. Open it in RStudio, point the data paths at your local copy of the datasets, and run it chunk by chunk.

### scRNA-seq Tutorial Series

Walk the standard **Seurat** scRNA-seq workflow on the public 10x **20k NSCLC DTC** dataset. Each tutorial has runnable code chunks and interleaved *Think about it* questions with collapsible answers.

| # | Exercise | View | Download |
|---|---|---|---|
| 01 | QC & Preprocessing | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.html) | [Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.qmd](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.qmd) |
| 02 | Dimensionality Reduction & Clustering | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_02_DimReduction_Clustering.html) | [Tutorial_02_DimReduction_Clustering.qmd](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_02_DimReduction_Clustering.qmd) |
| 03 | Markers & Cell Type Annotation | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_03_Markers_Annotation.html) | [Tutorial_03_Markers_Annotation.qmd](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_03_Markers_Annotation.qmd) |

### Bonus Exercise

| # | Exercise | View | Download |
|---|---|---|---|
| B | scATAC-seq with Signac (PBMC 10k) | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_ATACseq_Signac.html) | [Exercise_ATACseq_Signac.qmd](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_ATACseq_Signac.qmd) |

### Computing on Talapas

A standalone tutorial on using SLURM (Talapas's job scheduler) --- interactive sessions and batch scripts, specific to UO. Recommended before running anything non-trivial on the cluster.

| Tutorial | View | Download |
|---|---|---|
| SLURM Basics on Talapas (UO) | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_SLURM_Basics.html) | [Tutorial_SLURM_Basics.qmd](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_SLURM_Basics.qmd) |

### Exercise Template

| Exercise | View | Download |
|---|---|---|
| Blank template for your own exercise | [HTML](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_Template.html) | [Exercise_Template.qmd](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_Template.qmd) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Datasets used

Full dataset descriptions, direct download links, and data dictionaries live inside each exercise. Primary sources:

-   **scRNA-seq** — [10x Genomics: 20k NSCLC DTC, 3' v3.1 Multiplex](https://www.10xgenomics.com/resources/datasets/20-k-mixture-of-nsclc-dt-cs-from-7-donors-3-v-3-1-multiplex-3-1-standard-6-0-0)
-   **scATAC-seq** — [10x Genomics: PBMC 10k scATAC-seq v1.1](https://www.10xgenomics.com/resources/datasets/10-k-peripheral-blood-mononuclear-cells-pbm-cs-from-a-healthy-donor-next-gem-v-1-1-1-1-standard-2-0-0)

By convention the tutorials read from `../data/` (i.e. a `data/` folder at the repository root). Place your downloads there or adjust the paths in the `Read10X*` calls.
